commands.title: Single Pivoting (First Pivot)
commands.description: This command allows access to the internal subnet 192.168.110.0/24 via the first pivot box (10.10.110.35).

commands.title: Double Pivoting (Second Pivot)
commands.description: This command allows access to two internal subnets: 192.168.110.0/24 and a second deeper subnet 192.168.210.0/24 through the first pivot box.
